issue.title: hitomi.la

labels.name: A: Bug
labels.description: The issue is caused by an ad blocker bug

labels.name: Stale
labels.description: The issue was not processed on time and was bumped to the top of the list

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Ads) [NSFW] [https://hitomi.la/tag/female%3Afurry-all.html](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fhitomi.la%2Ftag%2Ffemale%253Afurry-all.html) ### Comment > 有时候不会刷出来 多F5几次就会有 > 而且出这个广告的时候点任何地方都会跳转到其他网站 adguard挡不住 ### [NSFW] Screenshots [Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/caq4xv2ge60wwk0088sk04ck0wcwc0bb1al38b86go.jpg?nc=1) ### System configuration Information | Value --- | --- AdGuard product: | AdGuard for Android v4.14 Nightly 25 System version: | `Android 13` Browser: | Chrome License type: | paid AdGuard mode: | VPN HTTPS filtering: | enabled Tracking protection: | **General settings**:
Block trackers,
Strip URLs from tracking parameters,
Hide your search queries

**Tracking methods**:
Self-destructing third-party cookies (180),
Self-destructing first-party cookies (4320)

**Browser API**:
Block Push API,
Block Location API

**Miscellaneous**:
Hide your Referrer from third-parties,
Remove X-Client-Data header from HTTP requests,
Protect against DPI DNS filtering: | server: `https://unfiltered.adguard-dns.com/dns-query`
filters: `https://filters.adtidy.org/android/filters/15_optimized.txt` Filters: | Ad blocking:
AdGuard Mobile Ads,
AdGuard Base

Privacy:
AdGuard URL Tracking,
AdGuard Tracking Protection

Social widgets:
AdGuard Social Media

Annoyances:
AdGuard Cookie Notices,
AdGuard Widgets,
AdGuard Popups,
AdGuard Other Annoyances,
AdGuard Mobile App Banners,
Adblock Warning Removal List

Security:
uBlock Origin – Badware risks,
Online Malicious URL Blocklist

Language-specific:
AdGuard Chinese Browsing Security: | enabled Browsing Security statistics: | disabled Userscripts: | `https://userscripts.adtidy.org/release/adguard-extra/1.0/adguard-extra.meta.js` ### Issue configuration [Import](https://reports.adguard.com/settings/import.html?product_type=and&product_version=4.14+Nightly+25&system_version=Android+13&browser=chrome&filters=11.18.22.19.2.207.21.17.4.3.257.208.20.224&dns_servers=https%3A%2F%2Funfiltered.adguard-dns.com%2Fdns-query&userscripts=https%253A%252F%252Fuserscripts.adtidy.org%252Frelease%252Fadguard-extra%252F1.0%252Fadguard-extra.meta.js&android.mode=VPN&android.system_root=false&dns.filters=https%253A%252F%252Ffilters.adtidy.org%252Fandroid%252Ffilters%252F15_optimized.txt&dns.filters_enabled=true&dns.enabled=true&https.filtering=true&browsing_security.enabled=true&browsing_security.statistics_enabled=false&stealth.enabled=true&stealth.webrtc=false&stealth.push=true&stealth.location=true&stealth.strip_url=true&stealth.hide_search_queries=true&stealth.DNT=false&stealth.referrer=&stealth.x_client=true&stealth.dpi=true&stealth.third_party_cookies=180&stealth.first_party_cookies=4320&stealth.disable_third_party_cache=false&stealth.block_third_party_auth=false&stealth.block_trackers=true&license_type=paid&dns.timeout=5000)
